full_text:
Ruan Xian (Zhongrong) 阮咸 (仲容)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ruan Xian (阮咸), styledZhongrong (仲容). One of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove and nephew of Ruan Ji. Ruan Xian was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
